_readme: 이 파일 하나만 고치면 index.html 과 cv.tex 가 자동으로 다시 만들어집니다.
고친 뒤 로컬에서 `python3 build.py` 를 돌리거나, 그냥 push 하면 GitHub Actions가 알아서 합니다.
글 안에서 쓸 수 있는 표기:
{me}          → 본인 이름 (굵게+밑줄)로 자동 변환
†             → 공동 1저자 표시로 자동 변환
_기울임_       → 강조 (밑줄 문자 두 개 사이)
[보이는 글](주소) → 링크
주의: URL 안에 & 를 넣지 마세요 (LaTeX에서 깨집니다). Scholar 주소는 user= 부분만으로 충분합니다.
논문에 graphical abstract 넣기 (웹페이지 전용, PDF에는 안 들어감):
이미지를 assets/abstracts/ 에 넣고 아래 세 필드를 채우세요.
"image":         "assets/abstracts/2026_AFM_Te.jpg"
"image_alt":     "Graphical abstract: 스크린리더용 설명"
"image_caption": "Adv. Funct. Mater. 2026"   (이미지 아래 작은 글씨, 없어도 됨)
image 이 비어 있으면 그 논문은 지금처럼 한 열로 표시됩니다. 섞여 있어도 괜찮습니다.
권장: 가로 1000px 내외, 200KB 이하. 클릭하면 원본이 새 탭에서 열립니다.
방문자 통계 (analytics 블록):
provider: goatcounter / cloudflare / plausible / umami / none
code:     goatcounter → 가입 시 정한 코드 (MYCODE.goatcounter.com 의 MYCODE 부분)
cloudflare  → beacon token / plausible → 도메인 / umami → website-id
public_url: 공개 대시보드 주소 (넣으면 푸터에 'Site stats' 링크가 생김. 없으면 빈 문자열)
provider 가 none 이면 스크립트가 아예 안 들어갑니다.
소속 기관 로고 (institutions 블록, 페이지 맨 아래):
logo 가 비어 있으면 기관명이 활자 워드마크로 표시됩니다 (기본값).
로고 파일을 assets/logos/ 에 넣고 "logo": "assets/logos/kaist.png" 처럼 채우면 이미지로 바뀝니다.
PNG(투명배경) 또는 SVG 권장. 높이 38px로 표시되니 세로 80px 이상 파일을 쓰세요.
로고는 상표입니다 — 각 기관 브랜드 가이드라인을 확인하세요. 자세한 내용은 README 참고.

personal.address: 291 Daehak-ro, Yuseong-gu, Daejeon, Republic of Korea

statement: I am a Ph.D. student in Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering at KAIST, pursuing _material- and process-level engineering_ of organic and inorganic semiconductors, and their device-level applications in neuromorphic systems, with a particular focus on _initiated Chemical Vapor Deposition (iCVD)_.

M.S., Dept. of Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering at KAIST
B.S., Dept. of Chemical Engineering at Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH)

experience.what: Visiting Scholar, Dept. of Materials Science and Engineering at Pennsylvania State University
detail: University Park, Supervisor: Prof. Saptarshi Das

experience.what: Intern, LOTTE Chemical Intellectual Properties Strategy Team
Intern, Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), Functional Thin Film Laboratory
Intern, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Chemical Engineering Lab
Intern, SK Hynix Future Technology R&D Center NAND Etch Team

honors.what: National Science & Technology Scholarship, Korea Student Aid Foundation

research.title: Development of p-type tellurium-based electronic devices

subs.title: High-hole-mobility p-type tellurium thin-film transistors enabled by iCVD-based polymeric passivation layers
bullets: Exploration and optimization of polymeric passivation layers to enhance switching characteristics of p-type transistor devices, including on/off ratio, carrier mobility, and threshold voltage
Analysis of carrier transport mechanisms through spectroscopic techniques (e.g., UPS, Raman) and electrical characterization (e.g., TLM, Schottky barrier analysis)
Development of vertically integrated CMOS logic circuits and flexible TFTs

subs.title: Enhancement of contact properties in Te TFTs using thermally decomposable polymeric contact interlayers for an ash-out strategy
bullets: Exploration and optimization of polymeric buffer layers to reduce contact resistance and enable higher current levels
Investigation of the ash-out process using in-situ heating-cell ellipsometry

research.title: High-performance vertical organic thin-film transistor devices

subs.title: Vertical organic thin-film transistors with vertically aligned carrier transport for high-current and high-frequency operation
bullets: Design of unconventional vertical organic thin-film transistor architectures and circuit layouts for complex logic circuits (e.g., ring oscillators, half adders)
Analysis of high-frequency device operation using a fast waveform generator and analyzer module (WGFMU) integrated into the B1500A

research.title: Next-generation neuromorphic devices and their applications

subs.title: Gate-injection-type organic synaptic transistors with tunable decay times for reservoir networks targeting human activity recognition
bullets: Rational selection and optimization of charge-storage-layer semiconductor materials to modulate gate-induced charge transfer and control EPSC decay characteristics

Implementation of synaptic transistors in various AI and neuromorphic applications (e.g., NeuroSim, machine learning), with a particular focus on human activity recognition tasks using the UCI-HAR dataset

skills.label: Polymer Fabrication & Surface Engineering
items: iCVD-based functional homopolymer and copolymer synthesis

skills.label: Fabrication and Characterization of Electronic Devices
items: 3-terminal devices: TFT, flash memory, synaptic devices
Multi-terminal devices/circuits: inverter, logic gates, ring oscillator
2D material-based transistor fabrication: sourcing, exfoliation, wet transfer

skills.label: Devices & Instruments
items: Probe station in glove box with temperature-controlled chuck
